authority: Corrective product work is authorized only inside this corridor. The frame, thresholds, objective denominator, real external access boundary, release boundary, and merge boundary do not change.

authorized_moves.scope: Add generic ExecutionContext.signal, optional caller signal on exec and execStream, private descendant and active-iterator bookkeeping, structured close ordering, exact cancellation classification, and generic Lite tests.

Add idempotent SessionRuntime deactivation, replace cleanup-to-finish with deactivation, remove SDK abort-tag bridges in favor of ExecutionContext.signal, preserve explicit finish, and prove same-Scope isolation and cleanup ordering.
Add one named safe SDK observation projection tag and observable integration, including same-Scope privacy and activation-close before sink settlement.

Remove every authoritative SDK lint diagnostic, replace dynamic WorkerRegistry dispatch and direct child process execution with declared graph ports, and repair the touched Codex ACP lifecycle regression.
Add the runnable fake-backed GitHub issue queue, repository, PostgreSQL, Victoria, hypothesis, independent verifier, and idempotent publication example with fixed sixteen-contract machine verifier.

forbidden_moves: Change the frame or weaken any threshold
Change the fixed objective denominator of sixteen
Add public cancel, spawn, start, task, pool, WorkerRegistry, or session semantics to Lite
Add arbitrary tag enumeration, a public ContextData callback, or implicit built-in tags
Replace eager activation of the complete declared dependency tree with lazy or implicit resolution
Add static missing-tag analysis in this frame
Use module mocks, internal reaches, or global patches outside an adapter atom unit test
Access real GitHub, PostgreSQL, Victoria, networks, credentials, or production data
Release, merge, or retire a standing wall
slice_gates: Run focused tests and authoritative lint for every touched package after each slice
Keep every non-target wall at zero and every target breaker non-increasing
Use createScope presets, tags, and extensions as the sole logic test seam
Update README and public docs with shipped code and compile their examples
Require a separate final validator for zero-wall and 16-of-16 completion claims
